_comment: ScarForge — Character Prompts. 32x32 top-down character sprites for a dark fantasy RPG. Name outputs with char_ prefix for auto-sort into Assets/Sprites/Characters/.

prompts.char_knight: pixel, pixel art, top-down 3/4 view, dark fantasy knight character, heavy plate armor, great helm with visor, sword and kite shield, dark steel armor with battle damage, tattered cape, muted steel and dark red palette, 32x32 sprite, game asset, clean pixel edges, no anti-aliasing, dark background
prompts.char_mage: pixel, pixel art, top-down 3/4 view, dark fantasy mage character, hooded dark robes, glowing staff with crystal, arcane runes on robe, old weathered face, muted purple and dark blue palette, 32x32 sprite, game asset, clean pixel edges, no anti-aliasing, dark background
prompts.char_rogue: pixel, pixel art, top-down 3/4 view, dark fantasy rogue character, leather armor, hooded cloak, twin daggers, belt pouches, shadowy figure, muted dark brown and black palette, 32x32 sprite, game asset, clean pixel edges, no anti-aliasing, dark background
prompts.char_archer: pixel, pixel art, top-down 3/4 view, dark fantasy ranger archer character, leather armor with fur trim, longbow and quiver of arrows, forest cloak, muted green and brown palette, 32x32 sprite, game asset, clean pixel edges, no anti-aliasing, dark background
prompts.char_cleric: pixel, pixel art, top-down 3/4 view, dark fantasy cleric character, chainmail under white-gray robes, holy symbol pendant, mace in hand, solemn expression, muted silver and off-white palette, 32x32 sprite, game asset, clean pixel edges, no anti-aliasing, dark background
prompts.char_barbarian: pixel, pixel art, top-down 3/4 view, dark fantasy barbarian character, bare chest with war paint, fur loincloth and boots, large battle axe, scarred muscular body, muted brown and red palette, 32x32 sprite, game asset, clean pixel edges, no anti-aliasing, dark background

negative: blurry, smooth gradients, anti-aliasing, 3d render, realistic, photographic, modern, futuristic, sci-fi, bright saturated colors, neon, watermark, text, signature, jpeg artifacts, low quality, deformed, ugly, oversaturated, bloom, glow effects, white background, cute, cartoonish
